description_long: This is a large, cubic wooden storage box constructed from vertically aligned planks, reinforced with diagonal and horizontal wooden slats for added structural integrity. The wood is weathered, displaying a natural brown color with visible grain patterns and knots, suggesting it is designed for durability in outdoor or rugged urban environments. Metal rivets are present at the corners, securing the slats and planks together. The top surface appears to be a flat wooden lid, matching the sides in material and finish, and is likely removable or liftable. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, giving the box a utilitarian and robust appearance. The box is suitable for placement on the ground, in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban settings, and can support other objects on its flat top.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage box with reinforced slats and a flat lid, designed for rugged urban or outdoor use. The box is robust, unadorned, and suitable for stacking or supporting other objects.
description_view_0: Front view shows vertical wooden planks with a diagonal reinforcing slat and visible metal rivets at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with similar plank and slat arrangement, but the diagonal slat angles in the opposite direction.
description_view_2: Back view displays vertical planks and a diagonal slat, mirroring the front but with subtle wood grain differences.
description_view_3: Opposite side view matches the other side, with the diagonal slat angled to mirror view 1, maintaining symmetry.
